have h₁ : addEquivAddHaarChar (ContinuousAddEquiv.mulLeft u : ContinuousAddEquiv ((FiniteAdeleRing (𝓞 K) K) ⊗[K] B) ((FiniteAdeleRing (𝓞 K) K) ⊗[K] B)) = 1 := by
    have h : addEquivAddHaarChar (ContinuousAddEquiv.mulLeft u : ContinuousAddEquiv ((FiniteAdeleRing (𝓞 K) K) ⊗[K] B) ((FiniteAdeleRing (𝓞 K) K) ⊗[K] B)) = 1 := by
      -- Use the fact that the measure is translation-invariant
      rw [addEquivAddHaarChar_eq_one_iff]
      <;>
      (try simp_all) <;>
      (try
        {
          -- Show that the image of the unit ball under the left multiplication by `u` has the same measure as the unit ball
          apply ContinuousAddEquiv.isMeasurePreserving
        }) <;>
      (try
        {
          -- Provide a suitable measurable set
          exact ⟨⊤, by simp [measurableSpace_top]⟩
        }) <;>
      (try
        {
          -- Show that the set is nonempty and measurable
          infer_instance
        }) <;>
      (try
        {
          -- Prove that the set is measurable and nonempty
          apply MeasurableSet.univ
        }) <;>
      (try
        {
          -- Use the fact that the set is the whole space and thus is nonempty and measurable
          infer_instance
        })
    exact h
  
  have h₂ : addEquivAddHaarChar (ContinuousAddEquiv.mulRight u : ContinuousAddEquiv ((FiniteAdeleRing (𝓞 K) K) ⊗[K] B) ((FiniteAdeleRing (𝓞 K) K) ⊗[K] B)) = 1 := by
    have h : addEquivAddHaarChar (ContinuousAddEquiv.mulRight u : ContinuousAddEquiv ((FiniteAdeleRing (𝓞 K) K) ⊗[K] B) ((FiniteAdeleRing (𝓞 K) K) ⊗[K] B)) = 1 := by
      -- Use the fact that the measure is translation-invariant
      rw [addEquivAddHaarChar_eq_one_iff]
      <;>
      (try simp_all) <;>
      (try
        {
          -- Show that the image of the unit ball under the right multiplication by `u` has the same measure as the unit ball
          apply ContinuousAddEquiv.isMeasurePreserving
        }) <;>
      (try
        {
          -- Provide a suitable measurable set
          exact ⟨⊤, by simp [measurableSpace_top]⟩
        }) <;>
      (try
        {
          -- Show that the set is nonempty and measurable
          infer_instance
        }) <;>
      (try
        {
          -- Prove that the set is measurable and nonempty
          apply MeasurableSet.univ
        }) <;>
      (try
        {
          -- Use the fact that the set is the whole space and thus is nonempty and measurable
          infer_instance
        })
    exact h
  
  have h₃ : addEquivAddHaarChar (ContinuousAddEquiv.mulLeft u) = addEquivAddHaarChar (ContinuousAddEquiv.mulRight u) := by
    rw [h₁, h₂]
  
  exact h₃
